headline: American Water lawyer: merger with Essential Utilities will not raise rates
summary: SCRANTON — A proposed merger of American Water Works, which is the parent firm of Pennsylvania American Water, and Essential Utilities, the parent company of Aqua Pennsylvania, will not raise rates, an attorney for American Water said Thursday during a public hearing. The two parent companies announced in October the proposed merger to become “a leading regulated U.S. water and wastewater ...
